ConSciR 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Using R for the first time
    • Conservation tools
    • Humidity functions
    • Sustainability

Conservation tools

Source: vignettes/articles/Conservation-tools.Rmd
Conservation-tools.Rmd
library(ConSciR)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

Temp <- seq(0, 60, 0.25)
RH <- seq(0, 100, 1)

TRHgrid <- 
  expand.grid(Temp, RH) |> 
  tibble() |> 
  rename(Temp = Var1, RH = Var2)

Mould

Zeng model


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(Mould_Zeng = calcMould_Zeng(Temp, RH)) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = Mould_Zeng)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  labs(title = "Mould Isoline Limit: LM0") + 
  theme_bw()


mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_Zeng = calcMould_Zeng(Temp, RH))
#> # A tibble: 35,136 × 6
#>    Site   Sensor Date                 Temp    RH Mould_Zeng
#>    <chr>  <chr>  <dttm>              <dbl> <dbl>      <dbl>
#>  1 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:00:00  21.8  36.8       75.1
#>  2 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:15:00  21.8  36.7       75.1
#>  3 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:29:59  21.8  36.6       75.1
#>  4 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:44:59  21.7  36.6       75.1
#>  5 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:59:59  21.7  36.5       75.1
#>  6 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:14:59  21.7  36.2       75.1
#>  7 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:29:59  21.7  36.3       75.1
#>  8 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:44:59  21.7  36.4       75.1
#>  9 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:59:59  21.7  36         75.1
#> 10 London Room 1 2024-01-01 02:14:59  21.6  36         75.2
#> # ℹ 35,126 more rows

mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_Zeng = calcMould_Zeng(Temp, RH)) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(Date, Mould_Zeng), col = "purple") +
  geom_line(aes(Date, RH), col = "blue") + 
  labs(title = "Mould Isoline Limit") + 
  theme_bw()


mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_Zeng = calcMould_Zeng(Temp, RH, label = TRUE)) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(Mould_Zeng, fill = Mould_Zeng)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Mould Isoline Limit") + 
  theme_void()

VTT model


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(Mould_VTT = calcMould_VTT(Temp, RH)) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = Mould_VTT)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  labs(title = "VTT Model") + 
  theme_bw()


mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_VTT = calcMould_VTT(Temp, RH))
#> # A tibble: 35,136 × 6
#>    Site   Sensor Date                 Temp    RH Mould_VTT
#>    <chr>  <chr>  <dttm>              <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>
#>  1 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:00:00  21.8  36.8         0
#>  2 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:15:00  21.8  36.7         0
#>  3 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:29:59  21.8  36.6         0
#>  4 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:44:59  21.7  36.6         0
#>  5 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:59:59  21.7  36.5         0
#>  6 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:14:59  21.7  36.2         0
#>  7 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:29:59  21.7  36.3         0
#>  8 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:44:59  21.7  36.4         0
#>  9 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:59:59  21.7  36           0
#> 10 London Room 1 2024-01-01 02:14:59  21.6  36           0
#> # ℹ 35,126 more rows

mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_VTT = calcMould_VTT(Temp, RH)) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(Date, Mould_VTT), col = "purple") +
  # geom_line(aes(Date, RH), col = "blue") + 
  labs(title = "VTT Model: Mould Index") + 
  theme_bw()


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(Mould_Sedlbauer = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "Sedlbauer")) |>
  filter(Mould_Sedlbauer < 100) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = Mould_Sedlbauer)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  labs(title = "Sedlbauer model: Critical RH for mould growth from temperature") + 
  theme_bw()


mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_Sedlbauer = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "Sedlbauer"))
#> # A tibble: 35,136 × 6
#>    Site   Sensor Date                 Temp    RH Mould_Sedlbauer
#>    <chr>  <chr>  <dttm>              <dbl> <dbl>           <dbl>
#>  1 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:00:00  21.8  36.8            73.5
#>  2 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:15:00  21.8  36.7            73.5
#>  3 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:29:59  21.8  36.6            73.5
#>  4 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:44:59  21.7  36.6            73.5
#>  5 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:59:59  21.7  36.5            73.5
#>  6 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:14:59  21.7  36.2            73.5
#>  7 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:29:59  21.7  36.3            73.5
#>  8 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:44:59  21.7  36.4            73.5
#>  9 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:59:59  21.7  36              73.5
#> 10 London Room 1 2024-01-01 02:14:59  21.6  36              73.5
#> # ℹ 35,126 more rows

mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_Sedlbauer = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "Sedlbauer")) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(Date, Mould_Sedlbauer), col = "purple") +
  geom_line(aes(Date, RH), col = "blue") + 
  labs(title = "Sedlbauer model: Critical RH for mould growth from temperature") + 
  theme_bw()


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(Mould_VIR = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "VIR")) |>
  filter(Mould_VIR < 100) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = Mould_VIR)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  labs(title = "VIR model: Critical RH for mould growth from temperature") + 
  theme_bw()



mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_VIR = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "VIR"))
#> # A tibble: 35,136 × 6
#>    Site   Sensor Date                 Temp    RH Mould_VIR
#>    <chr>  <chr>  <dttm>              <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>
#>  1 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:00:00  21.8  36.8      79.0
#>  2 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:15:00  21.8  36.7      79.0
#>  3 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:29:59  21.8  36.6      79.0
#>  4 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:44:59  21.7  36.6      79.0
#>  5 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:59:59  21.7  36.5      79.0
#>  6 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:14:59  21.7  36.2      79.0
#>  7 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:29:59  21.7  36.3      79.0
#>  8 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:44:59  21.7  36.4      79.0
#>  9 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:59:59  21.7  36        79.0
#> 10 London Room 1 2024-01-01 02:14:59  21.6  36        79.0
#> # ℹ 35,126 more rows

mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_VIR = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "VIR")) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(Date, Mould_VIR), col = "purple") +
  geom_line(aes(Date, RH), col = "blue") +
  labs(title = "VIR model: Critical RH for mould growth from temperature") + 
  theme_bw()


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(Mould_Daily_Dose = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "Isaksson")) |>
  filter(Mould_Daily_Dose > 0) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = Mould_Daily_Dose)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  labs(title = "Isaksson model: Daily dose (1/t(ms)) / D(rel/day)") + 
  theme_bw()


mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_Daily_Dose = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "Isaksson"))
#> # A tibble: 35,136 × 6
#>    Site   Sensor Date                 Temp    RH Mould_Daily_Dose
#>    <chr>  <chr>  <dttm>              <dbl> <dbl>            <dbl>
#>  1 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:00:00  21.8  36.8          -0.0140
#>  2 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:15:00  21.8  36.7          -0.0140
#>  3 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:29:59  21.8  36.6          -0.0140
#>  4 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:44:59  21.7  36.6          -0.0140
#>  5 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:59:59  21.7  36.5          -0.0140
#>  6 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:14:59  21.7  36.2          -0.0140
#>  7 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:29:59  21.7  36.3          -0.0140
#>  8 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:44:59  21.7  36.4          -0.0140
#>  9 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:59:59  21.7  36            -0.0140
#> 10 London Room 1 2024-01-01 02:14:59  21.6  36            -0.0139
#> # ℹ 35,126 more rows

mydata |>
  mutate(Mould_Daily_Dose = calcMould_models(Temp, RH, model = "Isaksson")) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(Date, Mould_Daily_Dose), col = "purple") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, col = "red") +
  labs(title = "Isaksson model: Daily dose (1/t(ms)) / D(rel/day)") + 
  theme_bw()

calcMould requires a dataset with a “Date” column.


mydata |>
  calcMould() 
#> # A tibble: 35,136 × 11
#>    Site   Sensor Date                 Temp    RH TempMould RHMould days_mould
#>    <chr>  <chr>  <dttm>              <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>   <dbl>      <dbl>
#>  1 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:00:00  21.8  36.8        22      37         NA
#>  2 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:15:00  21.8  36.7        22      37         NA
#>  3 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:29:59  21.8  36.6        22      37         NA
#>  4 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:44:59  21.7  36.6        22      37         NA
#>  5 London Room 1 2024-01-01 00:59:59  21.7  36.5        22      36         NA
#>  6 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:14:59  21.7  36.2        22      36         NA
#>  7 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:29:59  21.7  36.3        22      36         NA
#>  8 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:44:59  21.7  36.4        22      36         NA
#>  9 London Room 1 2024-01-01 01:59:59  21.7  36          22      36         NA
#> 10 London Room 1 2024-01-01 02:14:59  21.6  36          22      36         NA
#> # ℹ 35,126 more rows
#> # ℹ 3 more variables: time_diff <drtn>, mould_prob <dbl>, mould <dbl>

mydata |>
  calcMould() |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(Date, days_mould), col = "purple", size = 1) + 
  labs(title = "IPI model: Days to mould") + 
  theme_bw()


mydata |>
  calcMould() |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_area(aes(Date, mould), col = "purple") + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, col = "red") +
  labs(title = "IPI model: Mould probability") + 
  theme_bw()


mydata |>
  calcMould() |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(Date, mould), col = "purple") + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, col = "red") +
  scale_y_log10() + 
  labs(title = "IPI model: Mould probability (log scale)") + 
  theme_bw()

Lifetime multiplier 


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(LifeTime = calcLM(Temp, RH)) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = LifeTime)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  theme_bw()


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(LM_log = calcLM(Temp, RH) |> log10()) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = LM_log)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  theme_bw()

Preservation Index 


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(PI = calcPI(Temp, RH)) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = PI)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  theme_bw()


TRHgrid |>
  mutate(PI_log10 = calcPI(Temp, RH) |> log10()) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = PI_log10)) +
  geom_contour_filled(bins = 20) +
  theme_bw()

On this page
